scripts.build: uglifyjs template.js > template.min.js && brfs source.js > index.js
scripts.prepublish: npm run build && linify transform bin

scripts.test: TZ=Pacific/Auckland npm run test-tz && TZ=Europe/London npm run test-tz && TZ=America/Whitehorse npm run test-tz && npm run test-tz && jest --coverage --coverageThreshold='{ "global": { "lines": 100} }'
scripts.babel: cross-env BABEL_ENV=build babel src --out-dir esm --copy-files && node build/esm
scripts.build: cross-env BABEL_ENV=build node build && npm run size
scripts.test:sauce: npm run sauce -- 0 && npm run sauce -- 1 && npm run sauce -- 2  && npm run sauce -- 3

scripts.test:all: npm run test:index && npm run test:corejs && npm run test:uglified
scripts.test:harmony: node  --es-staging --harmony test && node  --es-staging --harmony test/corejs && node --es-staging --harmony test/uglified
scripts.postversion: auto-changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit --no-edit --amend && git tag -f "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")"

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:jest && npm run test:typescript
